title: Improving the Social Security Disability Determination Process
description: Urban Institute research report (July 2019) by Jack Smalligan and Chantel Boyens, part of Urban's 'From Safety Net to Solid Ground' initiative. The 38-page report describes SSA's disability determination and appeals process, examines concerns about the current process, identifies key challenges to reform, presents options to improve the determination process, and proposes strategies to initiate and empower SSA to reinvent its processes. It is a policy-analysis report on the structure and reform of how SSA and state DDSs adjudicate disability claims.
geographic_coverage: United States (federal — SSA disability determination, national)

source.title: Improving the Social Security Disability Determination Process
